decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to control the board through creating a strong defensive wall with cards like Nyxborn Hydra, Gixian Infiltrator, and Writhing Chrysalis, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Cast Down. The deck also utilizes cards like Cauldron Familiar and Troll of Khazad-dûm to generate value and maintain card advantage. With a mix of removal spells, token generators, and card draw, this Golgari/Jund Garden deck aims to outlast the opponent and grind out a victory through attrition.

This deck focuses on deploying artifact creatures quickly and efficiently, using cards that benefit from artifacts being on the battlefield. The main strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and direct damage spells, while also utilizing card draw to maintain resources. The deck features a variety of artifacts and artifact synergies, creating a fast-paced and proactive playstyle that aims to close out games quickly through efficient attacks and burn spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy artifacts and creatures to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By using cards like Refurbished Familiar and Myr Enforcer, alongside powerful artifacts like Tithing Blade and Blood Fountain, this deck aims to efficiently control the board and deal damage quickly. The inclusion of removal spells like Cast Down and Go for the Throat helps to eliminate any threats from the opponent, while cards like Thoughtcast provide card advantage. With a good mix of creatures, artifacts, and removal, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent in a Pauper 1 vs 1 match.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of aggressive red creatures, supported by efficient burn spells for removal and direct damage. The strategy is to play cheap creatures like Goblin Bushwhacker and Burning-Tree Emissary to establish an early board presence, while using burn spells like Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt to control the board and finish off the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Clockwork Percussionist and Voldaren Epicure to provide extra value and resilience in longer games. With a low mana curve and high damage output, the deck aims to win the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly casting a large number of artifact creatures and using various spells and abilities to control the board while dealing direct damage to the opponent. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and removal spells, utilizing card draw to maintain momentum. The key strategy is to efficiently deploy threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan, ultimately outpacing them through a combination of synergy and efficient use of resources.

The main idea behind this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells in order to deal damage quickly and efficiently. By combining low-cost creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Kitchen Imp with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, the deck aims to establish early board presence and chip away at the opponent's life total. Additionally, cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize provide card advantage and additional reach, while Duress and Vampire's Kiss disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent and close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this Rakdos Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. With a low mana curve, the deck aims to quickly deploy threats and deal damage efficiently. Cards like Voldaren Epicure, Sneaky Snacker, and Kitchen Imp provide early pressure, while Lightning Bolt, Fiery Temper, and Chain Lightning offer additional reach to finish off the opponent. Additionally, cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help to maintain card advantage and ensure a steady stream of threats. With a mix of creature aggression and burn spells, this deck aims to close out the game quickly.

The main focus of this Pauper 1 vs 1 Rakdos Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with low-cost aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Voldaren Epicure, Sneaky Snacker, and Kitchen Imp, along with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, the deck aims to deal damage efficiently and control the board. Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize provide card advantage and consistency, while Highway Robbery and Vampire's Kiss offer additional life gain to sustain the aggressive strategy. The deck also includes some land destruction with BojukaBog along with Rakdos Carnarium for resource management.

The focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using Elves as the primary creatures. By ramping up mana with Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania, the deck aims to quickly deploy threats like Nyxborn Hydra and Timberwatch Elf. Cards like Quirion Ranger and Masked Vandal provide utility and disruption, while Lead the Stampede ensures a steady stream of creatures. The goal is to apply constant pressure and outpace the opponent with powerful Elf synergies.

This Jund aggro deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive board presence while disrupting your opponent's strategy. With a mix of creature pump spells, removal, and card draw, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of efficient threats and graveyard hate. Utilizing efficient creatures and mana fixing lands, the deck looks to quickly apply pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This Mono Blue Aggro deck focuses on a low-cost, aggressive strategy utilizing creatures with evasion and tempo plays to quickly overwhelm opponents. The Faerie tribe provides synergy and incremental advantage, while counterspells and bounce effects help control the board and disrupt opponents' plays. The deck aims to maintain pressure, generate card advantage, and protect its threats to secure a quick victory against slower or less interactive decks in the Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this Mono Blue Aggro deck is to establish early pressure on the opponent using low-cost creatures like Delver of Secrets and Tolarian Terror. The deck also includes various card draw and counter spells to maintain tempo and control the game. By utilizing efficient spells like Thought Scour and Ponder, the deck aims to quickly cycle through the library to find the best cards needed for victory. Additionally, Sleep of the Dead offers a potential finisher to lock down the opponent's creatures and secure the win.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy focused on efficient creatures and removal spells. By utilizing cards like Glint Hawk, Kor Skyfisher, and Refurbished Familiar to generate value and apply pressure, combined with removal spells like Go for the Throat and Doom Blade to control the board, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and secure victory quickly. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Grim Bauble and Lembas provide card advantage and support the aggressive game plan. The deck also features some graveyard recursion and versatile utility spells for added flexibility.

This combo deck focuses on generating mana and sacrificing goblins to create value and eventually win the game. By utilizing cards like Skirk Prospector and Putrid Goblin, the deck aims to ramp up resources quickly and efficiently. The key strategy involves using cards like Impulsive Pilferer and Dark-Dweller Oracle to generate additional card advantage. The deck also includes disruption elements like Duress and Toxin Analysis to control the opponent's strategy. With a mix of sacrifice outlets, card draw, and removal, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of goblin creatures and spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. By using low-cost creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker, along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, you aim to deal damage quickly and efficiently. Faithless Looting helps you dig for your key cards, while Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery provide additional sources of damage. Alms of the Vein and Vampire's Kiss help you sustain yourself through life gain. Rakdos Carnarium and Jagged Barrens provide the necessary mana fixing for your spells.

The main concept of this Rakdos Aggro deck is to deploy low-cost aggressive creatures like Voldaren Epicure, Sneaky Snacker, and Kitchen Imp to quickly deal damage to the opponent. Removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper are used to clear the way for attacks, while cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize provide card advantage and additional resources. Highway Robbery and Alms of the Vein provide additional reach and life gain, ensuring the deck can maintain pressure on the opponent while closing out the game efficiently.
